description: Network infrastructure service contract v1 — 14 operations across device monitoring, client visibility, firewall state, and network security for managed switches, APs, gateways, and routers.

operations.description: Controller health check — version, hostname, device and client counts
operations.name: info

operations.description: List network devices (APs, switches, gateways) with state, model, clients, uptime, firmware
operations.name: devices

operations.description: Full detail for a single device — ports, PoE, firmware, upgrade status
operations.name: device

operations.description: Connected clients — name, IP, SSID/wired, signal strength, experience score, blocked status
operations.name: clients

operations.description: Full detail for a single client — TX/RX, vendor, AP association
operations.name: client

operations.description: Firewall policies — name, action, enabled/disabled, source/destination
operations.name: firewall

operations.description: Port forwarding rules — name, protocol, external to internal mapping
operations.name: port_forwards

operations.description: DPI restriction groups and apps — name, enabled/disabled
operations.name: dpi

operations.description: Wireless networks (SSIDs) — name, enabled/disabled, security, guest flag
operations.name: wlans

operations.description: Block a client from the network
operations.name: block_client

operations.description: Enable or disable a wireless network
operations.name: toggle_wlan

operations.description: Restart a network device (AP, switch, gateway)
operations.name: restart_device

title: network-v1
